message:
feat(pt-core): Add categorization output and causal interventions enhancements

- Add CategorizationOutput struct to pt-common for structured categorization results
- Enhance causal_interventions.rs with recovery expectation computations
- Update plan module with improved planning logic
- Update test infrastructure for better test support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
